title: S9 1RT, ELG Metals UK Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/LB3437RX/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: ELG Metals UK Limited Installation name: Templeborough Works Permit number: EPR/LB3437RX/V007  "
